name: AK-47 | 翔鹤
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. A crane and gold accents have been hand painted over a black and white base. Preceding the blood moon
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 黑白底色上手绘仙鹤与金色装饰。 血月将至之兆

name: AK-47 | 灼心怒焰
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. This custom, art brut paint job depicts the scattered thoughts of a once sane member of the Elite Crew. RU$HKILLxDESTROY//NOxFEAR-ATTACKBURN!TERROR
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 它采用了描绘精英部队成员精神崩溃的粗野艺术涂装。 沖杀x毁灭//不再x恐惧-攻击焚烧！怖

name: AK-47 | 流金王朝
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. It has been custom painted to replicate the look and feel of a luxury white and black puffer jacket and finished with gold accents. Seek power, gain power, hold power
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 这把武器的定制涂装复刻了奢华黑白羽绒夹克的外观与质感，并以金色装点。 追寻权力，获取权力，掌控权力

name: AK-47 | 局外人
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. It has been custom painted with crude depictions of Ts in different situations. The Ts on the bus win rounds and rounds, rounds and rounds, rounds and rounds
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 这款定制涂装为T方在不同场景中的简笔画。 公交车上的T方赢了一局又一局，一局又一局，一局又一局

name: AK-47 | 传承
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. This custom paint job takes inspiration from traditional Chinese porcelain and Delft Blauw art. A \"family\" heirloom, passed through generations
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 此定制涂装的灵感来源于传统的中国瓷器和代尔夫特蓝陶艺术。 一把传家宝，世代永相传

name: AK-47 | 水栽竹
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. It has been painted with a bamboo motif using metallic paints. Notice how Gunsmith Yukako used the wood of the AK-47 to accentuate her verdant theme... make no mistake: Hydroponic is as beautiful and deadly as nature itself - Imogen, Arms Dealer In Training
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 这把武器使用金属涂料，以竹子图案进行了涂装。 瞧瞧枪匠友佳子是如何利用 AK-47 的木质部分突出它的翠绿主题的…… 只要不失误：溶液培养如同自然生长一样漂亮和致命 - 实习军火商伊莫金

name: AK-47 | 卡特尔
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. It has been engraved with skeletons, flowers and serpents. One little squeeze turns every morning into the Day of the Dead
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 这把武器被雕刻上了骷髅、鲜花和巨蟒。 轻轻扣动扳机就使美好的一天成为亡灵之日

name: AK-47 | 表面淬火
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. It has been color case-hardened through the application of wood charcoal at high temperatures. A little color never hurt anyone
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 通过木炭在高温下的应用，这把武器已被彩色表面淬火。 一点彩色痕迹无伤大雅

name: AK-47 | 幻影破坏者
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. A mistform illusion creature has been custom painted over a matte black base. \"It can be whatever it wants, wherever it wants, and yet it chooses to reside with you…\"
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 采用了自定义涂装，磨砂黑底色上涂有一种雾状的幻想生物。 “它可以随心所欲，随欲而往，却选择与您同在。。。”

name: AK-47 | 霓虹革命
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. It has been given an eclectic mix of hydrographic decals then drip painted. No suicide squad would be complete without it
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 这件武器有不拘一格的涂装混搭贴花并使用了滴画法。 自杀攻击怎能缺了它？

name: AK-47 | 阿努比斯军团
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. A custom paint job featuring Egyptian gods Anubis and Ra, representing the balance between life and death, has been applied. May he tip the scales in your favor
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 这把武器采用了埃及阿努比斯神和太阳神的定绘，代表生死平衡。 愿胜利的天平能向你倾斜

name: AK-47 | 二西莫夫
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. It has been custom painted with a sci-fi design. Anyone can predict the future... a visionary shapes it
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 这把武器使用科幻设计进行了自定义涂装。 平凡人预测未来……梦想家塑造未来

name: AK-47 | 迷踪秘境
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. A custom paint job of various tribal patterns has been applied. We share the same canoe
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 运用了多个部落风涂装. 我们同舟共济

name: AK-47 | 红线
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. It has been painted using a carbon fiber hydrographic and a dry-transfer decal of a red pinstripe. Never be afraid to push it to the limit
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 这把武器使用碳素纤维的花纹和红色细条纹风格的干式转印贴花进行了涂装。 别顾忌，将威力发挥到极致

name: AK-47 | 可燃冰
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. It has been custom painted with a vibrant green and blue gradient. Cold to the touch
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 这把武器采用醒目的绿色和蓝色渐变进行了自定义涂装。 触感冰冷

name: AK-47 | 深海复仇
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. It has been custom painted with the image of a pod of dolphins. Is there an echo in here?
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 这把武器使用海豚群的图像进行了自定义涂装。 这里有回声吗？

name: AK-47 | 精英之作
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. It has been custom painted using a combination of hydrographics and careful stenciling and detailed with heat-transfer decals. Tread softly Naomi...people in your line of work aren't known for their longevity - The Shield and The Serpent Part 2
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 这把武器将花纹和严谨的漏印结合起来，通过热转印贴花加强细节，然后进行了自定义涂装。 小心翼翼的娜奥米啊…… 和你干同一个行当的人可不是以长命著称的呢 -《盾与蛇（下）》

name: AK-47 | 夜愿
descriptionEn: Powerful and reliable, the AK-47 is one of the most popular assault rifles in the world. It is most deadly in short, controlled bursts of fire. It has been custom painted with a deer and dreamcatchers in neon colors and finished with a pearlescent effect. I've been saving this for a special occasion... – Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 强大又可靠，AK-47 是世上最流行的突击步枪之一。近距离内控制好的短点射极为致命。 这把武器采用荧光色的鹿和捕梦网进行了自定义涂装，并用珠光特效加以点缀。 我一直在为一个特殊的场合留着这个…… - 军火商布兹
